name: Skull Greymon

signature_move.name: Ground Zero
signature_move.description: Shoots an organic missile from its spinal cord.

description: Current Previous Original ⇨ Japanese A Skeleton Digimon whose whole body has become nothing but bones. It was a Digimon that put too much importance on fighting, and as a result of its combat instinct it clung to life despite its body rotting away, becoming Skull Greymon. As Skull Greymon doesn't have even a scrap of intelligence to balance its combat instinct, its existence is a threat to other Digimon. Its Special Move is an organic missile launched from its spinal cord ( Oblivion Bird ).
